## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only change

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Additional manual validation (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused in scope
- [ ] I updated tests/docs as needed
- [ ] I followed the contribution guidelines
